description: Create a Bridge Command scenario named 'z) Wreck of MV Meridian' in the Solent environment to simulate a shipwreck at 50.7000 N, 1.3000 W. The wreck must be marked by four cardinal buoys positioned exactly 0.5 nautical miles from the center in the four cardinal directions (North, East, South, West). Configure the scenario in /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/z) Wreck of MV Meridian/ using environment.ini (Solent world, 12:00 start, overcast weather), ownship.ini, and othership.ini. The othership.ini file must contain the wreck (Models/environment/wreck_surface) and the four cardinal marks (Models/Buoys/cardinal_north, cardinal_east, cardinal_south, and cardinal_west) at their respective calculated coordinates.
